author: DataRock Labs
name: 2026-04-21_Hymba10B_SP1024_6x512_KV4_8h_unet
blurb: Single-GPU 1xH100 submission with a Hymba hybrid Attention+Mamba SSM model using SP1024 tokenization, U-Net skip connections, BigramHash embeddings, sequence length curriculum, and bias-corrected EMA. Final pre-quant validation reached 1.3375 bpb, with post-quant roundtrip validation at 1.3419 bpb under the 16MB artifact cap.
